body.title: Clean up design_docs/ — archive CSBs, create human-readable set
body.result: Archived 7 .csb.txt per-ticket design files from design_docs/ to design_docs/archive/. Added README.md explaining the three-directory convention. Human-readable .md set in design_docs/ unchanged.
body.description: Archive CSB files, create clean human-readable doc set in design_docs/. #218
